title: Lilavati Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lilavati Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Lilavati Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lilavati Hospital:
Lilavati Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital!
